summary: Feature Testing Complete - All requested features verified and working: 1) Admin Wholesale (Großkunden) Tab with light theme, 2) Wholesale approval without user account (API returns user_linked: false), 3) Translations for auction cards (uvp, lastSoldFor, activity) present in all major languages, 4) Freunde werben link visible in navbar for logged-in users, 5) Maintenance mode toggle working correctly

wholesale_light_theme.details: Admin Wholesale panel uses light theme with white backgrounds, slate text colors, and proper contrast

wholesale_approval_without_user.details: API /api/admin/wholesale/approve/{id} successfully approves applications without existing user account. Returns user_linked: false and message about linking on registration

wholesale_info_banner.details: Modal shows info banner: 'Falls noch kein Benutzerkonto existiert, wird die Freischaltung gespeichert und automatisch verknüpft, sobald sich der Kunde registriert.'

translations_uvp.details: UVP translation key found in 17+ languages. German shows 'UVP:', English shows 'RRP:'

translations_lastSoldFor.details: lastSoldFor translation key found. German shows 'Zuletzt für', English shows 'Last sold for'

translations_activity.details: Activity indicators translated. German shows 'Heiß/Ruhig', English shows 'Hot/Calm'

freunde_werben_link.details: 'Freunde werben' link visible in navbar for logged-in users (pink text), navigates to /referral page

maintenance_mode.details: Maintenance mode toggle works correctly. Can enable/disable via Admin > Wartung tab

language_switching.details: Language switching works correctly. Tested German to English - all auction card translations update properly

seed_data_creation: Created test wholesale applications for testing approval without user account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: 1) Wholesale Tab has light theme with white backgrounds and dark text, 2) Wholesale approval works without user account - API returns user_linked: false, 3) Translations for uvp, lastSoldFor, activity exist in all major languages, 4) Freunde werben link visible in navbar for logged-in users, 5) Maintenance mode toggle works via Admin > Wartung tab. No issues found.
